recommendations.title: Made in Italy
recommendations.overview: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

recommendations.title: Warning
recommendations.overview: Loneliness, death and the meaning of life, explored through vastly separate lives colliding in interweaving short stories set in future Earth.

recommendations.title: Guernica
recommendations.overview: The fates of Henry - an American correspondent - and Teresa, one of the Republic's censors during the Spanish Civil War.

recommendations.title: Bombshell: The Hedy Lamarr Story
recommendations.overview: The life and career of the hailed Hollywood movie star and underappreciated genius inventor, Hedy Lamarr.

recommendations.title: The Trench
recommendations.overview: The Trench tells the story of a group of young British soldiers on the eve of the Battle of the Somme in the summer of 1916, the worst defeat in British military history. Against this ill-fated backdrop, the movie depicts the soldiers' experience as

recommendations.title: The Truman Show
recommendations.overview: In a picture-perfect seaside town, an insurance salesman begins to realize that his entire existence may be staged and observed by a vast unseen audience as part of a reality TV show.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
recommendations.overview: After a couple adopts a pair of orphaned brothers, it becomes alarmingly clear the boys are much more than they seem.

recommendations.title: After the Dark
recommendations.overview: At an international school in Jakarta, a philosophy teacher challenges his class of twenty graduating seniors to choose which ten of them would take shelter underground and reboot the human race in the event of a nuclear apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Love on the Sidelines
recommendations.overview: A down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with an injury. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.
